ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network (e.g., Google, Yahoo, Facebook) */,
  "network_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network type (e.g., search engine, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., enterprise, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the website */,
  "website_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website type (e.g., blog, e-commerce) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_website_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_type_id") REFERENCES website_types ("website_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the session took place */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network used to access the website */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL of the referrer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_rates" (
  "conversion_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rate */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the conversion took place */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network used to access the website */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the website */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rates_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rates_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rates_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bounce_rates" (
  "bounce_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bounce rate */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the bounce took place */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network used to access the website */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the website */,
  "bounce_time" TEXT /* Average time spent on the website before bouncing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bounce_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounce_rates_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounce_rates_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_changes" (
  "percentage_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage change */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the percentage change took place */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network used to access the website */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in traffic for the website */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the percentage change (e.g., week-over-week, month-over-month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that includes this detail */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being reported on */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network used to access the website */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being reported on */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Date range for the report (e.g., week-over-week, month-over-month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metric_definitions ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_definitions" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., sessions, conversion rate) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., #, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_types" (
  "network_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network type */,
  "network_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the network type (e.g., search engine, social media) */,
  "network_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the network type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_types" (
  "website_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website type */,
  "website_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the website type (e.g., blog, e-commerce) */,
  "website_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the website type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "network_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network performance entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being reported on */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being reported on */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Date range for the network performance (e.g., week-over-week, month-over-month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metric_definitions ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the goal is set */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal (e.g., purchase, sign-up) */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_conversions" (
  "goal_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal conversion */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal that was converted */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the conversion took place */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion */,
  "conversion_value" REAL /* Value of the conversion (e.g., revenue, points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_conversions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_conversions_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)
